reference: Hi there, I was wondering if you could help me. I had a baby six months ago, and I have been bleeding on and off ever since. I started to think it was just my monthly cycle, but the blood seems very fresh; it's very pink. I have also been getting stomach cramps. Is there anything you can suggest?
text: Hi there. I was wondering if you could help me. I had a baby six months ago and I have been bleeding on and off ever since. I started thinking it was just my monthly cycle, but the blood seems very fresh. It's very pink. I have also been getting stomach cramps. Is there anything you can suggest?
